overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a spaceship flying over the moon Vatra, transitioning from the dark night side to the sunlit day side with a dramatic atmospheric sunrise over the planetary horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space above dark moon surface

events.description: text overlay 'Moon Vatra' appears in the lower right corner identifying the location
approaching the terminator line as atmospheric glow begins to brighten on the horizon

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship over the dark side of the moon at high altitude

entered.detail: dark greenish planetary surface curving below the spaceship
diffuse cosmic gas clouds visible in the background starfield
white text label identifying the moon location

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies over the dark side of Moon Vatra, with the planet's surface appearing as a shadowed green curve below. The text 'Moon Vatra' appears on screen, and the ship approaches the terminator line where a faint atmospheric glow begins to emerge on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space crossing terminator into sunlight

events.description: dramatic sunrise as the horizon brightens with intense red and white atmospheric glow
the sun becomes visible as a bright star above the planetary horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing high-speed flight over the moon surface now fully illuminated by direct sunlight

entered.detail: intense white and red glowing atmospheric scattering along the planetary horizon
bright stellar object appearing above the horizon illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: The spaceship crosses the terminator into daylight, with the moon's atmosphere creating a brilliant glowing arc along the horizon. The surface transitions from shadow to bright daylight as the sun emerges from behind the planet, washing out the distant nebula and casting the ship in full illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship travels from the shadowed night side of Moon Vatra into a brilliant, sunlit day side. It begins with the ship gliding over the dark, shadowed green curve of the lunar surface, moving steadily toward the terminator line where a faint atmospheric glow first emerges on the horizon. As the ship crosses this boundary, the scene shifts from deep shadow to blinding light, with the atmosphere forming a brilliant glowing arc along the planetary edge. The environment then opens up as the sun emerges from behind the planet, washing out the distant nebula and casting the spaceship in full, radiant illumination.
